description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named Build PIP Packages that can be triggered manually or called by another workflow. The workflow should have a build job that runs on a matrix of macOS and Windows environments, checking out the repository, setting up C++, Python, and cache, installing build dependencies, updating PyPI version if specified, building PIP packages, and uploading artifacts. Additionally, create a publish job that runs on ubuntu-latest, waiting for the build job to complete, and downloads the PIP package artifacts.
